title: Fix Vortex token UIR resolution in WS gateways + secondary numeric index
description: Root bug: InstrumentRegistryService.warmMaps() stores Vortex mappings as 'vortex:NSE_EQ-213123' but callers look up 'vortex:213123' (numeric). Three-layer fix: (1) add secondary numeric key in registry warmup with collision detection, (2) gateway doSubscribe() prefers full exchange-token key for Vortex, (3) native-ws handleSubscribe() gains NSE_EQ-213123 string parsing.
close_reason: All three layers fixed: registry secondary numeric index, gateway resolveUirForPair helper, native-ws EXCHANGE-TOKEN string parsing. 26 tests pass.

title: Binance: tests + dashboard + docs (CLAUDE.md, MODULE_DOC, .env.example)
description: Tests: binance-websocket.client.spec.ts, binance-provider.service.spec.ts, binance-instrument-sync.service.spec.ts. Dashboard: admin-api.ts + Provider page. Docs: CLAUDE.md feature row + env vars, MODULE_DOC.md changelog. Run: npm run verify:pr
close_reason: Tests + dashboard + docs shipped. .env.example: BINANCE_INSTRUMENT_SYNC_ENABLED, BINANCE_INSTRUMENTS_CRON, BINANCE_QUOTES, BINANCE_WS_RECONNECT_MAX_ATTEMPTS. CLAUDE.md: feature row + provider abstraction + streaming arch + key env-vars table all extended for binance. Dashboard: AdminProviderName widened to include binance/massive. Tests: binance-websocket.client.spec.ts (11) + binance-provider.service.spec.ts (7). Caught and fixed a real subscribe-dedup bug. verify:pr GREEN — 17 suites, 131 tests pass; build clean; no new cycles.

title: Binance: wire into resolver, registry, universal-LTP, app.module
description: Files: market-data-provider-resolver.service.ts (constructor + getProvider + getEnabledProviders), market-data.module.ts, instrument-registry.service.ts (getBestProviderForUirId fallback), universal-ltp.service.ts (4th Promise.all arm), stock.module.ts, app.module.ts, admin.controller.ts (enum)
close_reason: Wire-up complete: BinanceModule imported by app.module/market-data.module/stock.module. MarketDataProviderResolverService injects BinanceProviderService + adds 'binance' branch in getProvider + arm in getEnabledProviders. InstrumentRegistryService.getBestProviderForUirId fallback chain extended; resolveCrossProvider returns binanceToken. UniversalLtpService gets 4th parallel arm calling binanceProvider.getLTPByPairs. Admin controller enum + error message extended. Admin-instruments + admin-massive controllers surface binanceToken/hasBinance. nest build clean; madge shows 6 cycles, all pre-existing (none touch binance).

title: Binance: instrument sync cron + admin controller
description: Files: src/features/binance/application/binance-instrument-sync.service.ts (mirrors massive sync), interface/admin-binance.controller.ts (manual trigger + status)
close_reason: Sync service (binance-instrument-sync.service.ts) + admin controller (admin-binance.controller.ts) + module wiring (binance.module.ts) shipped. Sync filters TRADING + isSpotTradingAllowed + quote-asset whitelist; upserts binance_instruments + instrument_mappings (instrument_token=0 sentinel) + universal_instruments (canonical='BINANCE:SYMBOL', asset_class='crypto', segment='spot'); refreshes registry. Admin endpoints: POST /api/admin/binance/instruments/sync, GET /sync/status, GET /status, GET /instruments, GET /instruments/resolve. tsc clean.

title: Binance: WebSocket client (combined-stream, JSON-RPC, 1024 limit)
description: Files: src/features/binance/infra/binance-websocket.client.ts (TickerLike facade), dto/binance-ws-event.dto.ts. Live SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE on open socket, exponential backoff reconnect, normalize trade events.
close_reason: WebSocket client (binance-websocket.client.ts) implemented. Single combined-stream connection (wss://stream.binance.com:9443/stream), JSON-RPC SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE on open socket, exponential-backoff reconnect with re-subscribe on reopen, trade-frame normalization → BinanceCanonicalTick, defensive guards for ack/error/wrapped/unwrapped frames. tsc clean.

title: Binance: scaffold module + entity + migration
close_reason: Scaffold complete: binance.constants.ts, binance-instrument.entity.ts, migration 20260426_create_binance_instruments.ts, dto/binance-exchange-info.dto.ts, dto/binance-ws-event.dto.ts, MODULE_DOC.md. tsc clean. binance.module.ts deferred until services exist (built in pj9/y2z/2kg).

title: Binance: REST client + provider service
close_reason: REST client (binance-rest.client.ts) + provider service (binance-provider.service.ts) implemented. Public unauthenticated REST: getExchangeInfo, getTickerPrices, get24hrTicker, getKlines. MarketDataProvider impl: getInstruments/LTP/Quote/OHLC/HistoricalData + getLTPByPairs + initializeTicker + getSubscriptionLimit(1024) + getShardStatus. tsc clean.

title: Binance: util widening (provider-label, exchange-to-provider, mapping entity)
description: Non-breaking: widen InternalProviderName union, add BINANCE→binance routing, accept binance alias. Files: src/shared/utils/provider-label.util.ts, src/shared/utils/exchange-to-provider.util.ts, src/features/market-data/domain/instrument-mapping.entity.ts
close_reason: Util widening complete: InternalProviderName/ClientVisibleProviderName/normalizeProviderAlias/internalToClientProviderName widened, EXCHANGE_TO_PROVIDER['BINANCE']='binance' added, instrument_mapping + api_key entity unions widened. tsc -p tsconfig.build.json passes.

title: Add Binance market-data provider (parent feature)
description: Add Binance (binance.com global, Spot only) as a 4th streaming provider parallel to Kite/Vortex/Massive. Crypto coverage via universal_instruments + UIR. Plan: ~/.claude/plans/we-have-difrrent-providers-valiant-flask.md
close_reason: Binance market-data provider shipped. ~13 new files, 10 modified. Provider routes via EXCHANGE_TO_PROVIDER['BINANCE']='binance'. Single combined-stream WS with JSON-RPC SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE, 1024-stream cap, exponential reconnect with re-subscribe. Daily cron syncs ~800 quote-filtered spot pairs into universal_instruments. Universal-LTP returns binance prices alongside vortex/kite/massive. verify:pr green.
